$comment: Phase-1 drift-sensitive catalog IDs. Citations: Hard 2013 (tubular basophilia/CPN), Dinse 2010 (cardiomyopathy drift), Thomas 2007 (thyroid C-cell drift). Extending the list is a future cycle.

rationale.C12: Tubular basophilia -- chronic progressive nephropathy drift (Hard 2013).
rationale.C15: Thyroid follicular hypertrophy -- aged C-cell drift (Thomas 2007).
